docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-22-2018 AT 6:30PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, ARTHUR
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES FROM PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PRESCOD, VIOLET AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, ARTHUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-22-2018 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VIOLET PRESCOD APPEARED. DEFENDANT ARTHUR DOUGLAS DID NOT APPEAR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRESCOD, VIOLET AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGLAS, ARTHUR
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PRESCOD, VIOLET

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-02-2018 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VIOLET PRESCOD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON RECORD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK; G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/17/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
